# Redis (ime servisa iz docker-compose.yml je "redis")
Redis__ConnectionString=redis:6379,abortConnect=false

# Postgres (servis "postgres" u compose-u)
ConnectionStrings__Database=Host=postgres;Port=5432;Database=oneclickecho;Username=oneclickecho_admin;Password=sfrgtCEH22

# OpenIddict (obavezno u Dockeru — vrednosti sa starog servera ili generiši nove)
OpenIddict__Issuer=https://viber.oneclick.rs
OpenIddict__@viber:/var/www/OneClickEcho#

PUBLIC_UPLOADS_BASE_URL=https://viber.oneclick.rs/uploads
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://viber.oneclick.rs/api
API_INTERNAL_URL=http://api:3901

# Opciono — Comtrade message id pod
VIBER_CAMPAIGN_MESSAGE_ID_FLOOR=1000
